Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Why don't we try adding some spice today?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Go ahead and blend it however you like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 4 1 5}I always find this to be so relaxing... I suppose you could call it a moment of bliss.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Let me know whenever you're in the mood for more tea. I'd be happy to treat you.[n]{f 1 1}
